category_sources: Official project page describes projectable as a TUI file manager built for projects.
source_facts.description identifies projectable as a TUI file manager built for projects.
display_name_sources: Official project page and source_facts.repo use the lowercase projectable name.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo points to the official repository; README is the official documentation surface for installation, configuration, and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/dzfrias/projectable, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official project page describes projectable as a TUI file manager built for projects.
source_facts.description identifies a project-oriented TUI file manager.
